title: Vulkan Mod Translations
description: This resource pack unofficially translates VulkanMod into a variety of languages!
body:
# !!! WARNING !!!
### This is not an official resource pack! Please, original creator of [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod), do not block this. Feel free to use my translations for [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) if you'd like!
### Additionally, these translations were created using ChatGPT 4.0! I personally reviewed each one.

## **Multi Languages Support!**
This compact resource pack translates **[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)** into the following languages:

- **French (Français)**
- **Ukrainian (Українська)**
- **Russian (Русский)**
- **German (Deutsch)**
- **Portuguese (Português)**
- **Arabic (عربي)**
- **Chinese (中國人)**
- **Japanese (日本語)**
- **Spanish (Español)**
- **Romanian (română)**
- **Polish (Polski)**
- **Indonesian (Indonesia)**

Compatible with **[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)** version **0.4.8** and earlier.  
You can find the original **[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)** here.

# FAQ:
### - Can i use it in my modpack?
Of course! Use it as you wish.
### - Is there a GitHub repo or something?
Absolutely! If you're encountering any issues or need assistance with translations, please feel free to create a GitHub issue [here](https://github.com/Nixxback/Vulkan-Mod-Translations/issues/new). Alternatively, if you'd like to contribute a new translation, you can submit a pull request in [here](https://github.com/Nixxback/Vulkan-Mod-Translations/pulls).
